subject: Re:
body:
your call, I don't know him

----- Original Message ----
From: Marvin Minsky <minsky@media.mit.edu>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, November 3, 2007 1:40:23 PM
Subject: 

I need to ask you if you would recommend inviting Mike Dubno to the  
planning discussion on Nov 17.
He would like to come, but my colleagues don't want anyone there that  
they don't already know.
